sentences.text: Thank you for calling Jasmine Residential. If you know your party's extension, you may dial it at any time. For the operator, press zero or stay on the line. For the dial by name directory, press nine. To repeat this menu, Please enter at least the first three letters of the person's last name for Q. Press seven for Z. Press nine. For the main Samantha Allen Extension one hundred and twenty-two To select this extension, press one to repeat the current name, press three more.
